title: rpm: do not load iptables modules on f41+
body:
As we started to default to nftables on f41[1,2] we no longer have to load legacy iptables modules.

[1] https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Changes/NetavarkNftablesDefault
[2] https://github.com/containers/netavark/pull/1038

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
LGTM, just checking ... this is not something set by the system so that upgrades to 41 would be set to iptables and we leave them out in the cold ?

> LGTM, just checking ... this is not something set by the system so that upgrades to 41 would be set to iptables and we leave them out in the cold ?

The driver will be changed for existing containers as well so they should not longer use that. 
The one thing is when user manually set firewall_driver = iptables in containers.conf then they would have to add this back when they run rootless, so I guess some concern is fair here. I will update the fedora change request to document this change here. In the end it is trivial for users to add this files with these modules back if they need to.
